narrative:
Perry Township has 4,086 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.8 percentage points.
